# orval

https://github.com/anymaniax/orval

## CLI
```shell
npx orval --input ./api-docs.json --output ./client
```
## Generated

```typescript filename="client/openAPIDefinition.ts"
/**
 * Generated by orval v6.29.1 🍺
 * Do not edit manually.
 * OpenAPI definition
 * OpenAPI spec version: v0
 */
import axios from 'axios'
import type {
  AxiosRequestConfig,
  AxiosResponse
} from 'axios'
export interface User {
  /** @nullable */
  email?: string | null;
  username: string;
}

export interface Post {
  content: string;
  id: number;
  user: User;
}





  export const allPost = <TData = AxiosResponse<Post[]>>(
     options?: AxiosRequestConfig
 ): Promise<TData> => {
    return axios.get(
      `/posts`,options
    );
  }

export type AllPostResult = AxiosResponse<Post[]>
```
